scripts.build:native: npm run build:copy && napi build --platform --release --cwd ./rs --js index.cjs && npm run build:bindings
scripts.build:native:dev: npm run build:copy && napi build --platform --cwd ./rs --js index.cjs && npm run build:bindings
scripts.build:bindings: node -e "const fs = require('fs'); const src = 'rs'; const dest = 'build/native'; if (!fs.existsSync(dest)) fs.mkdirSync(dest, {recursive:true}); const f = fs.readdirSync(src).find(x => x.endsWith('.node')); if (f) { fs.renameSync(src + '/' + f, dest + '/' + f); ['index.d.ts', 'index.cjs'].forEach(x => { const p = src + '/' + x; if(fs.existsSync(p)) fs.renameSync(p, dest + '/' + x) }); console.log('Moved ' + f + ' from ' + src + ' to ' + dest); } else { console.log('Source dir: ' + src); console.error('No .node file found in ' + src); process.exit(1); }"
